docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JAMES R. TROY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY'S REPRESENTATIVE ALLISUN KENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROY, JAMES R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY $7,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,995.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,920.00 FILED BY TROY, JAMES R AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/25/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY
